title: NAEB Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: National Afforestation and Eco-Development Board (NAEB) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NAEB Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: NAEB Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Afforestation and Eco-Development Board (NAEB) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NAEB Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Forestry, Forestry Management, Natural Resource Management, Environmental Science, Environmental Biology, Life Sciences
qualification.details: Master's Degree from a recognized university in Forestry, Forestry Management, Natural Resource Management, Environmental Science, Environmental Biology, Life Sciences, Information Sciences, Economics with Statistics, Agriculture with Statistics or Agricultural Economics. Minimum 01 year working experience in a Government Agency/Council regarding implementation of National Level Scheme or Programme. Proficiency in computer operations, accounting software and standard MS Office applications. Fluency in English and Hindi.

selection_process: Screening of applications by Screening Committee Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NAEB Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NAEB Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NAEB Research Associate positions is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Research Associate position by the National Afforestation and Eco-Development Board.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in specific fields like Forestry, Environmental Science, Life Sciences, Economics with Statistics, or Agricultural Economics, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Associate post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NAEB Research Associate recruitment must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the NAEB Research Associate positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications by a committee, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Research Associate positions are offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the NAEB located?
faq.answer: The National Afforestation and Eco-Development Board (NAEB) is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110003.
